title: CLI: /profile slash commands
description:
Profile fields managed via explicit verb commands — one job per command, no parse tricks:

/iam <name>         — set own display name (existing command, unchanged)
/set <key> <value>  — set a profile field (broadcasts updated profile to room)
/unset <key>        — delete a profile field (broadcasts updated profile to room)
/profile [handle]   — show own profile (no arg) or another user's last-seen profile

Key constraints: max 32 fields, key max 32 bytes (lowercase alphanumeric + underscore), value max 256 bytes. /set and /unset save to profile.json in the data dir and immediately rebroadcast the full updated profile.
